name: pascalcase
description:
Takes the `value` string, and turns it into PascalCase. Optionally, you can
pass in the existing case of the function, or else we will try to figure out the case automatically.

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: The string to convert to PascalCase.

arguments.name: original_case
arguments.description: Optional hint on the original case type. Must be one of: kebab-case, camelCase, PascalCase, SCREAMING_SNAKE, snake_case
